articles.title: BPCL Commissions Bargarh 2G Refinery with 100 KL/Day Bioethanol Production for E20 Targets
articles.description: Bharat Petroleum has commissioned its advanced 2G Bioethanol Refinery at Bargarh with 100 KL per day production capacity, utilizing cutting-edge lignocellulosic technology to convert rice straw into fuel-grade bioethanol. The facility features Zero Liquid Discharge design and supports India's E20 ethanol blending programme while achieving 20 million LTA-free manhours during construction.
articles.content: Bharat Petroleum has successfully commissioned its Second-Generation (2G) Bioethanol Refinery at Bargarh, marking a significant milestone in India's advanced biofuel production capabilities. The facility has commenced operations with bioethanol produ... [6505 chars]

articles.title: Forge Nano Announces Opening of Taiwan Office to Accelerate AI-Driven Photonics Manufacturing and Expand Regional Operations
articles.description: Hosting Strategic Taiwan Technical Seminar: Forge Nano will host its 'Advanced ALDx Applications for Photonics” seminar on March 31, 2026 in Hsinchu formally introducing its ALDx platform to Taiwan’s photonics ecosystem and engaging key industry leaders and customers around next-generation manufacturing solutionsProven Photonics Performance Driving Expansion: Forge Nano’s ALDx technology has demonstrated up to 23% reduction in insertion loss, 240-hour HAST reliability, and void-free conformal coatings in high aspect ratio structures translating to improved yield, higher uptime, faster production ramp, and lower total cost of ownership for advanced photonics devices DENVER and TAIPEI, Taiwan, March 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- As AI-driven data center growth accelerates and next-generation architectures push silicon photonics into high-volume production, manufacturers face increasing pressure to overcome reliability, yield, and scaling bottlenecks. Forge Nano, Inc., a leading U.S. based semiconductor equipment and advanced materials company pioneering Atomic Layer Deposition (ALD) technology for AI-era chip manufacturing and defense battery applications, today announced the opening of its Taiwan engineering and service office positioning the company as a critical partner in enabling the next phase of photonics manufacturing.
articles.content: Hosting Strategic Taiwan Technical Seminar: Forge Nano will host its "Advanced ALDx Applications for Photonics” seminar on March 31, 2026 in Hsinchu formally introducing its ALDx platform to Taiwan’s photonics ecosystem and engaging key industry lead... [5519 chars]

articles.title: Could a simple tracker have prevented LaGuardia collision?
articles.description: Could a simple transponder have prevented Sunday's tragedy at LaGuardia, and is the technology being used in Chicago?
articles.content:
Federal investigators back-timed the crash and have now determined that there were “20 Seconds to Impact” from the moment a fire truck was given permission to cross a runway that an Air Canada Express jet had just landed on.
But now we also know that... [2315 chars]

articles.title: Drone baiting aims to eradicate infestation of house mice from remote WA island
articles.description: Scientists are using 'world-first' drone-baiting technology to eradicate house mice infestation from a remote WA island to save seabirds.
articles.content:
Australian researchers are hoping drone-baiting technology will bring migratory seabirds "back from the brink", by eradicating thousands of house mice which have plagued a remote island off Western Australia's north since the late 1800s.
More than 70... [2834 chars]

articles.title: Investigators focus on potential overlapping failures in LaGuardia crash
articles.description: The preliminary investigation into the deadly runway collision at LaGuardia Airport in New York late Sunday suggests it was caused by an overlapping series of failures that stemmed from problems with staffing and technology, officials from the National Transportation Safety Board said Tuesday.
articles.content: And the two controllers on duty on Sunday night were doing the duties that during busier hours would likely have been distributed among more controllers. Homendy said such practice was common during night shifts at airports across the country, but th... [4247 chars]

articles.description: GUEST RESEARCH:  Rapid7 has released a whitepaper titled “The Weaponisation of Cellular Based IoT Technology,” by Deral Heiland, principal s...
articles.content: The paper examines how attackers with physical access can exploit cellular modules in Internet of Things (IoT) devices to move into cloud and backend environments, exfiltrate data, and conceal command channels within expected device traffic. Heiland ... [1870 chars]
